title: relay/main.rs: POW_DIFFICULTY clamp to 20 warns but does not reject the configured value — ambiguous operator UX
description: When POW_DIFFICULTY is set to a value between 1 and 19, the code emits 'clamping to 20' but the ensure check on the line above already allowed values up to MAX_DIFFICULTY. The warning reads as a correction but the variable description says it is invalid. An operator who sets POW_DIFFICULTY=5 expecting 'weak PoW enabled' will see the relay start and accept the misconfiguration with only a warn. Refusing to start with an error message is clearer than silently clamping.
